license_basis: skimage bundled asset, no per-file copyright notice; scikit-image data submodule
regenerate: python3 -c "from skimage.data import coffee; from PIL import Image; Image.fromarray(coffee(),'RGB').save('tests/fixtures/tool/tool_001.jpg','JPEG',quality=90,optimize=True,progressive=False)"
notes: YOLOv8n COCO returns class 41 'cup' on this image. Bootstrap pipeline ignores class labels (used strictly as region proposer); DINOv2-small CLS embedding zero-padded to 512d is what gets seeded into identity_embeddings.
